name: Mark Avila
headline: Stop starting every job search from scratch! I help Directors & HR leaders revive past applicants and turn them into quick hires. Building the recruitment-alternative | $100k in agency fees saved!
text: Solid advice, I found myself in the same trap when I first started. I think most operators underestimate the marketing side of going out on your own, and having both levers moving.
llm_reasoning: Headline indicates they ARE a consultant who helps with hiring, and the comment is retrospective advice-giving about past experience starting out rather than describing a current forcing moment.
